name: rv-level-cards
description: Animated RV tank level cards for Home Assistant Lovelace dashboards.

scripts.check: node --check src/rv-tank-level-card.js && node --check scripts/build.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-dist.mjs && node -e "JSON.parse(require('node:fs').readFileSync('hacs.json', 'utf8'))"
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run build && node scripts/verify-dist.mjs
